data.text: This bead is an epic with 10 downstream beads and hits the depth-2 split cap, so I’m not going to attempt partial implementation. I’m writing the required no-changes rationale in the execution evidence directory and stopping there.

Wrote `.ddx/executions/20260505T125439-78b29e39/no_changes_rationale.txt` with `status: needs_investigation`.

Reason: this bead is an epic with 10 child beads across multiple subsystems, and the execution tree is already at decomposition depth 2, so it cannot be safely executed or split further in this pass.
